name: work-loop-best-effort-oserror-handling
title: Harden work-loop file I/O and best-effort cleanup
description: Fleet validation found one candidate-file UTF-8 boundary defect and repeated GitHub Code Quality findings for unexplained empty OSError handlers in the shipped work-loop helper. Pin strict decoding and document intentional best-effort chmod and cleanup suppression in the pack source and template twin.
